title: benningtonbanner.com remains an active live article discovery surface
known_facts: The target URL is structured as a live public article page rather than a removed or obviously suppressed record.
Reviewed source material reflects Open Graph article metadata and canonical article URL indicators.
Article title and descriptive metadata remain present in reviewed source material.
Reviewed source material reflects a robots meta value of max-image-preview:standard.
No blanket noindex directive was identified in the reviewed source excerpts.
Active analytics, production scripts, and platform-mediated page resources remain present.
The page behavior and related assets are consistent with TownNews/BLOX-style publishing or delivery components.
The domain's public registration layer is privacy-shielded through Domains By Proxy, LLC.
The domain registrar is GoDaddy.com, LLC.
DNS delegation is served through AWS Route 53 nameservers.
The available technical record supports a layered infrastructure model rather than a single transparent operator surface.
what_is_not_established: This record does not establish editorial ownership solely from infrastructure data.
This record does not establish the origin host from registration or DNS data alone.
This record does not establish that the site is generally noindexed or excluded from search engines.
This record does not establish full delivery-path attribution beyond the specific layers directly observed.

impact_assessment.summary: The domain remains relevant as a live article discovery surface that can reinforce persistent identity association through continued public availability, structured article metadata, and platform-mediated discoverability.

governance_rationale: Because the reviewed materials indicate an active article surface with live metadata, no observed noindex directive in the reviewed excerpts, and a layered delivery environment consistent with continued discoverability, the domain should be treated as an active non-academic association surface requiring restrictive governance treatment.
defensive_use_notes: Treat the domain as an active article-source incident target rather than a stale archive assumption.
Use only directly supported technical observations in incident records and avoid overattribution.
Preserve separation between registration privacy, registrar, DNS, and application-layer observations.
Use this record to support search-discovery tracking, suppression analysis, and identity-association documentation.
